meaning: adj.[常用以构成复合词]智力...的,头脑...的
examples: She was quick-witted and had an extraordinarily agile mind.
Don't you see what it MEANS, you--you dull-witted animal?
An' us all thinkin' he was a poor half-witted lad with not a straight bone in him.
And they rallied with him as a slow-witted Southerner in the 1994 runaway hit Forrest Gump.
Indeed, even as the dull-witted leviathan sinks, many nimble companies have shown remarkably resiliency.
